evidence.claim: Used Vector Search, LlamaIndex, OpenSearch, Java, Qdrant, Weaviate, BM25, Deep Learning, LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, Fine-tuning LLMs, ASR, Diffusion Models, QLoRA, Hadoop, and Feature Engineering
evidence.source_text: Skills: Vector Search... LlamaIndex... OpenSearch... Java... Qdrant... Feature Engineering... Weaviate... BM25... Deep Learning... LangChain... Hugging Face Transformers... Fine-tuning LLMs... ASR... Diffusion Models... QLoRA... Hadoop

evidence.claim: Migrated keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search feature for ~500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS

evidence.claim: Trained and shipped ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Led the team that migrated keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Owned offline-online correlation analysis for ranking models
evidence.source_text: Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion)
Education: M.Sc in Machine Learning at IISc Bangalore (2021)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over theoretical knowledge
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
